MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Table Of Contents
Off Calendar Jun-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ricardo Martinez, Esq. of McNamara Law Firm, Tel. 925.939.5330, for defendant and moving party;
Lizzeth Montoya, Tel. 415.285.0440, plaintiff appearing on her own behalf, together with Joseph Angel Montoya and John James Montoya.

RULING: The matter was discussed. Plaintiffs did not file a timely opposition nor provided notice that they are contesting the tentative ruling. Therefore, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAI-SUN HO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189.
